title: Places
description: A liminal space minecraft mod focusing on making exploring them a fun survival sandbox experience
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49e377e0691a849eb43f4fe0a0b1aa5ad9b590c3.png)

A little mod adding 4 new dimensions (plus a couple small sub dimensions) heavily inspired by other popular liminal places/aesthetics to the game, alongside new mobs, items, paintings, music discs and blocks (obviously).

Most of the relevant information about the features of the mod can actually be found through the **item tooltips** and **advancements** so be sure to look in there if you wanna learn about how some of the features work. Otherwise you can also join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/Xk7BVWhTex) and just ask about stuff directly in there!

**Also for ppl with photosensitivity:** the mod does contain a thing with **FLASHING LIGHTS**, and as of the latest update there is a photosensitivity config (that hopefully works).

## Music
All of the background tracks have been made by my awesome friend **LudoCrypt** so go check out her [Bandcamp](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/music) if you wanna listen to it and also go buy her music.
Most of the level discs are made by [WebCreature](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCyjXoaQvCOS5QEF3rkAnXFg)! go check out their music on their [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/1CY7JoQn2njPp9tyuLD71s)

![Banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1941b10b67cbd6ddb5d15949f89f16275f661009_0.webp)
## 
Feel free to use the mod in your modpacks AS LONG as there is no generative AI used in them **anywhere** :)
